nodes.description: Classifies a claim into discourse categories (METHODOLOGICAL, SUBSTANTIVE, etc.).
nodes.name: classify_claim_type

nodes.description: Detects contradiction via Hoyer sparsity of embedding difference vectors.
nodes.name: contradiction_geometry

nodes.description: Predicts the embedding-space neighborhood where a new proposition's logical contradiction should lie, then surfaces nearby existing propositions as unconfirmed candidates.
nodes.name: contradiction_probe

nodes.description: Decomposes a founder's voice into an intellectual profile with orientation scores.
nodes.name: decompose_voice

nodes.description: Ingests external literature and matches claims against internal positions.
nodes.name: external_claim_match

nodes.description: Extracts atomic truth-apt claims from a text chunk using an LLM.
nodes.name: extract_claims

nodes.description: Extracts portable methodology profiles from a source text.
nodes.name: extract_methodology

nodes.description: Extracts falsifiable world predictions from a single claim using an LLM.
nodes.name: extract_prediction

nodes.description: Scans ingested artifacts for passages describing a methodology and extracts structured method candidates via regex + LLM.
nodes.name: method_candidate_extractor

nodes.description: NLI cross-encoder scorer for claim pair coherence using DeBERTa.
nodes.name: nli_scorer

nodes.description: Six-layer coherence aggregation with 4/6 majority voting.
nodes.name: six_layer_coherence

nodes.description: Generates research topics, empirical anchors, and reading lists after a discussion.
nodes.name: suggest_research

nodes.description: Registers a substantive conclusion and returns method calibration feedback.
nodes.name: synthesize_conclusion
